heading: VPC Peering
body:
Atlas Stream Processing charges for VPC peering connections at either an hourly
or monthly rate. These rates vary by region.

| Region          | Hourly Price per Connection | Monthly Price per Connection |
| --------------- | --------------------------- | ---------------------------- |
| asia-southeast1 | $0.0617                     | $45.03                       |
| europe-west1    | $0.0551                     | $40.19                       |
| europe-west2    | $0.0570                     | $41.61                       |
| europe-west3    | $0.0590                     | $43.07                       |
| europe-west4    | $0.0525                     | $38.32                       |
| us-central1     | $0.0500                     | $36.50                       |
| us-east1        | $0.0500                     | $36.50                       |
| us-east4        | $0.0500                     | $36.50                       |
| us-east7        | $0.0500                     | $36.50                       |
| us-west1        | $0.0500                     | $36.50                       |
